hero.subtitle: Setup in 2 minutes. No cookie banners. 100% EU-hosted. The friendly alternative to GA4.

technology.subtitle: We didn't just build another analytics tool. We re-engineered the entire stack to align with European values of privacy, speed, and independence.

rustCore.title: Rust Core
rustCore.description: Our backend is built in Rust for memory safety and extreme performance. This allows us to process millions of events with sub-millisecond latency.

tenKb.title: 10KB Script
tenKb.description: A tiny, dependency-free tracking script. It loads instantly and has zero impact on your Core Web Vitals or SEO rankings.

euInfra.title: EU Infrastructure
euInfra.description: We use 100% European cloud providers like Hetzner and Scaleway. Your data never touches US-owned servers or sub-processors.

privacy.description: IP addresses are hashed and salted at the edge. We never store identifiable data, removing the need for cookie banners.

sovereignty.description: Our network topology is strictly confined to the European Union, protecting your users from foreign surveillance.

sustainability.description: Rust's low resource footprint means we use 90% less server energy than traditional Node.js or Python analytics stacks.

cta.heading: Ready to switch to sovereign analytics?

features.heading: POWERFUL, NOT COMPLICATED.
features.subtext: Everything you need to understand your users, without the technical headache or privacy risks.

noBanners.title: No Banners Needed
noBanners.text: Skip the cookie consent popups. Our anonymized tracking is 100% GDPR compliant by default.

instantLoad.title: Instant Load
instantLoad.text: A tiny 10KB script that won't slow down your site. Built in Rust for maximum speed.

hundredEu.title: 100% EU
hundredEu.text: Your data stays in Europe. Hosted, owned, and operated on EU soil.

setup.title: Setup in Minutes
setup.text: Copy-paste one line of code and you're live. No complex configuration required.

footer.tagline: The high-performance, privacy-first analytics platform built for the European digital economy.

sustainability.subtitle: By choosing Rust for our core API, we've eliminated 90% of the energy waste found in traditional analytics stacks. High performance doesn't have to cost the earth.

comparisons.heading: THE RUST ADVANTAGE
comparisons.subtitle: Most analytics platforms run on high-level languages that require massive server clusters. We run on bare metal.

costs.title: Lower Operational Costs
costs.text: Efficiency isn't just green—it's cheap. We pass these server savings directly to you through our competitive pricing.

future.title: Future-Proof Tech
future.text: As EU regulations on digital sustainability tighten, our stack is already ahead of the curve.

carbon.heading: Carbon Neutral API
carbon.text: Our Rust core is so efficient it runs on a fraction of the hardware required by GA4.

cta.heading: Ready for a greener analytics stack?

pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No US data transfers. Just simple, powerful analytics.
pricing.sovereigntyBadge: 100% EU-Owned & Operated. No US Data Transfers.

privacy.quote: "Our Rust core anonymizes data at the edge, satisfying EU regulators without annoying your users."
